chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.S- 1794 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders as to non-prosecution of main petition, as notices not issued as neither copy nor cost provided by learned Counsel for petitioner. 18.11.2016. None present. -.-.-. On first date of hearing though the petitioner’s Counsel was not present but the matter was taken up in the interest of justice as purportedly it involves the question of life and liberty of the petitioner. Notices were issued to the respondents while granting restraining order in favour of petitioner. Today, office has put up a note that neither copies of the petition have been supplied nor cost has been paid enabling the Branch to take further steps. It appears that purpose of filing instant petition perhaps was not bonafide. Consequently, the same is dismissed being meritless. JUDGE
